title: crotalaria sagittalis var. parviflora
intro: Crotalaria sagittalis var. parviflora is a plant species, also known as a variety of the bird's foot crotalaria, a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria sagittalis var. parviflora include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and the potential treatment of certain infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine in various parts of Africa.
